---
title: "plot genotype data for multiple models"
author: "Andrea Chen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

# parameters for plotting
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# parameters for plotting
dataset_name <- "fluc_env"
date <- "5_12"

# set these once for your machine / project
analysis_root <- "../zc524/collective_behavior_evo/figure/1_26_fluctuating_env"
base_plot_folder     <- file.path("../zc524/collective_behavior_evo/figure/plots", date)
r_data_folder    <- file.path("../zc524/collective_behavior_evo/figure", "r_data", dataset_name)

library(MetBrewer)

if (!dir.exists(base_plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(base_plot_folder, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}

met_brewer_pallete <- "Austria"  # color pattern for lines
```

# load genotype data
```{r}
geno_df <- readRDS(file.path(r_data_folder, "genotype.rds"))
pheno_df <- readRDS(file.path(r_data_folder, "phenotype.rds"))
# group_tag_df <- readRDS(file.path(r_data_folder, "group_tag.rds"))
# fitness_df <- readRDS(file.path(r_data_folder, "fitness_norm.rds"))
# copied_val_df <- readRDS(file.path(r_data_folder, "copied_val.rds"))
# pheno_df <- readRDS(file.path(r_data_folder, "phenotype.rds"))
```

```{r}
geno_df <- genotype_df
pheno_df <- phenotype_df
unique(geno_df$psi)

```
# parameter space for data
```{r}
psi_val <- c(0.46)
single_psi <- 0.2

colors_for_psi <- met.brewer(name=met_brewer_pallete, n=4, type="discrete")
psi_col_map <- setNames(colors_for_psi, c(0.0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8))

for (gen in list(9965)) {
  for (n in c(8)){
    for (shift_size in c(80)){
      for (gap in c(80)){
        for (reg in c("fit")){
          for (type in c( "genotype", "phenotype")){
            cat("Plotting:", type, " generation:", gen, " n:", n, " shift_size:", shift_size, " reg:", reg, "\n")
      
            breaks_vec <- seq(-60.5, 0.5, by = 1)  
            if (type == "genotype"){
              df_to_use <- geno_df
            } else if (type == "phenotype"){
              df_to_use <- pheno_df
            } else if (type == "copied_val"){
              df_to_use <- copied_val_df
            } else if (type == "geno_pheno_diff"){
              df_to_use <- diff_df
            }

            if (length(gen) > 1 ){
              gen_title <- paste0(gen[1], "-", gen[2])
            }else{
              gen_title <- gen
            }

            if(gen_title >= 10000){
              title <- paste0(type, "_", gen_title, "/", reg, "_", shift_size,"_", n, "opt = ", shift_size)
            }else{
              title <- paste0(type, "_", gen_title, "/", reg, "_", shift_size,"_", n, "opt = ", 0)
            }

            if (is.integer(shift_size)){
              filt_A <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.0, shift_size=shift_size, gap=gap)
              filt_B <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.2, shift_size=shift_size, gap=gap)
              filt_C <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.5, shift_size=shift_size, gap=gap)
              filt_D <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.8, shift_size=shift_size, gap=gap)

              filt_single <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=single_psi, shift_size=shift_size, gap=gap)
            }else{
              filt_A <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.0, gap=gap)
              filt_B <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.2, gap=gap)
              filt_C <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.5, gap=gap)
              filt_D <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.8, gap=gap)

              filt_single <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=single_psi, gap=gap)
            }

            fils <- list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C, filt_D)
            # fils <- list(filt_single)
            if (length(fils) == 1){
              plot_folder = file.path(base_plot_folder, paste0("fluc_", type, "_", gen_title, "_", single_psi))
            }else{
              plot_folder = file.path(base_plot_folder, paste0("fluc_", type, "_", gen_title))
            }

            dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings=FALSE)
            pdf(file.path(plot_folder, paste0(reg, "_sz_", shift_size,"_n_", n,"_gap_", gap, ".pdf")), width=11.5, height=8)
            
            par(cex.axis = 2.0, cex.lab = 2.0, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(6, 6, 3, 1) + 0.2, mgp = c(3.8, 1.5, 0))
            cols <- psi_col_map[as.character(sapply(fils, function(f) f$psi))]
            plot_hist_lines_multi(
              df = df_to_use,
              # filters = list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C),
              filters = fils,
              generation = gen,
              breaks = breaks_vec,
              labels = list(title = title,
                            x = ifelse(type == "genotype", "Genotype value", "Phenotype value"),
                            y = "Proportion"),
              show_rep = TRUE,
              ymax = if (type == "genotype") 0.06 else 0.1,
              cols = cols,
              lwd = 5
            )
            leg_expr <- as.expression(lapply(lapply(fils, function(f) f$psi), function(v) bquote(psi == .(v))))
                  
            legend("topright", bty = "n",
                    legend = leg_expr,
                  col = cols, lwd = 2, cex=2.2)
            dev.off()
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
psi_val <- c(0.46)
single_psi <- 0.5
gen <- c(10000, 10010, 10020, 10030, 10050, 10070, 10080)

colors_for_psi <- met.brewer(name=met_brewer_pallete, n=4, type="discrete")
psi_col_map <- setNames(colors_for_psi, c(0.0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8))

for (n in c(8)){
  for (shift_size in c(100)){
    for (gap in c(50)){
      for (reg in c("fit")){
        for (type in c( "phenotype")){
          cat("Plotting:", type, " generation:", gen, " n:", n, " shift_size:", shift_size, " reg:", reg, "\n")
    
          breaks_vec <- seq(-20.5, 40.5, by = 1)  
          if (type == "genotype"){
            df_to_use <- geno_df
          } else if (type == "phenotype"){
            df_to_use <- pheno_df
          } else if (type == "copied_val"){
            df_to_use <- copied_val_df
          } else if (type == "geno_pheno_diff"){
            df_to_use <- diff_df
          }

          if (length(gen) > 1 ){
            gen_title <- paste0(gen[1], "-", gen[[length(gen)]])
          }else{
            gen_title <- gen
          }

          if(gen_title >= 10000){
            title <- paste0(type, "_", gen_title, "/", reg, "_", shift_size,"_", n, "opt = ", shift_size)
          }else{
            title <- paste0(type, "_", gen_title, "/", reg, "_", shift_size,"_", n, "opt = ", 0)
          }

          if (is.integer(shift_size)){
            filt_A <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.0, shift_size=shift_size, gap=gap)
            filt_B <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.2, shift_size=shift_size, gap=gap)
            filt_C <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.5, shift_size=shift_size, gap=gap)
            filt_D <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.8, shift_size=shift_size, gap=gap)

            filt_single <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=single_psi, shift_size=shift_size, gap=gap)
          }else{
            filt_A <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.0, gap=gap)
            filt_B <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.2, gap=gap)
            filt_C <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.5, gap=gap)
            filt_D <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.8, gap=gap)

            filt_single <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=single_psi, gap=gap)
          }

          # fils <- list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C, filt_D)
          fils <- list(filt_single)
          if (length(fils) == 1){
            plot_folder = file.path(base_plot_folder, paste0(type, "_", gen_title, "_", single_psi, "_multigen"))
          }else{
            plot_folder = file.path(base_plot_folder, paste0(type, "_", gen_title, "_multigen"))
          }

          dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings=FALSE)
          pdf(file.path(plot_folder, paste0(reg, "_sz_", shift_size,"_n_", n,"_gap_", gap, ".pdf")), width=11.5, height=8)
          
          par(cex.axis = 2.0, cex.lab = 2.0, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(6, 6, 3, 1) + 0.2, mgp = c(3.8, 1.5, 0))
          # cols <- hcl.colors(4, hcl_color_palette)
          cols <- psi_col_map[as.character(sapply(fils, function(f) f$psi))]
          # cols <- c(cols[1], cols[2], cols[3])
          plot_hist_lines_multi_gen(
            df = df_to_use,
            filters = fils,
            generations = gen,
            breaks = breaks_vec,
            labels = list(
              title = paste0(type, " distribution across generations"),
              x = if (type == "genotype") "Genotype value"  else "Phenotype value",
              y = "Proportion"
            ),
            show_generation = TRUE,
            generation_alpha = c(0.2, 1),
            plot_mean = FALSE,
            show_rep = FALSE,
            cols = cols,
          )
          leg_expr <- as.expression(lapply(lapply(fils, function(f) f$psi), function(v) bquote(psi == .(v))))
                
          legend("topright", bty = "n",
                  legend = leg_expr,
                col = cols, lwd = 2, cex=2.2)
          dev.off()
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

```


```{r}
psi_val <- c(0.46)
single_psi <- 0.5
gen <- c(seq(9950, 9995, by=5), seq(9996, 10009, by=1), seq(10010, 10045, by=5))

colors_for_psi <- met.brewer(name=met_brewer_pallete, n=4, type="discrete")
psi_col_map <- setNames(colors_for_psi, c(0.0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8))

for (n in c(8)){
  for (shift_size in c(40)){
    for (gap in c(50)){
      for (reg in c("fit")){
        for (type in c( "phenotype")){
          cat("Plotting:", type, " generation:", gen, " n:", n, " shift_size:", shift_size, " reg:", reg, "\n")
    
          breaks_vec <- seq(-20.5, 40.5, by = 1)  
          if (type == "genotype"){
            df_to_use <- geno_df
          } else if (type == "phenotype"){
            df_to_use <- pheno_df
          } else if (type == "copied_val"){
            df_to_use <- copied_val_df
          } else if (type == "geno_pheno_diff"){
            df_to_use <- diff_df
          }

          if (length(gen) > 1 ){
            gen_title <- paste0(gen[1], "-", gen[[length(gen)]])
          }else{
            gen_title <- gen
          }

          if(gen_title >= 10000){
            title <- paste0(type, "_", gen_title, "_skewness/", reg, "_", shift_size,"_", n, "opt = ", shift_size)
          }else{
            title <- paste0(type, "_", gen_title, "_skewness/", reg, "_", shift_size,"_", n, "opt = ", 0)
          }

          if (is.integer(shift_size)){
            filt_A <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.0, shift_size=shift_size, gap=gap)
            filt_B <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.2, shift_size=shift_size, gap=gap)
            filt_C <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.5, shift_size=shift_size, gap=gap)
            filt_D <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.8, shift_size=shift_size, gap=gap)

            filt_single <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=single_psi, shift_size=shift_size, gap=gap)
          }else{
            filt_A <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.0, gap=gap)
            filt_B <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.2, gap=gap)
            filt_C <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.5, gap=gap)
            filt_D <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.8, gap=gap)

            filt_single <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=single_psi, gap=gap)
          }

          fils <- list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C, filt_D)
          # fils <- list(filt_single)
          if (length(fils) == 1){
            plot_folder = file.path(base_plot_folder, paste0("fluc_", type, "_", gen_title, "_", single_psi, "_skewness"))
          }else{
            plot_folder = file.path(base_plot_folder, paste0("fluc_", type, "_", gen_title, "_skewness"))
          }

          dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings=FALSE)
          pdf(file.path(plot_folder, paste0(reg, "_sz_", shift_size,"_n_", n,"_gap_", gap, ".pdf")), width=11.5, height=8)
          
          par(cex.axis = 2.0, cex.lab = 2.0, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(6, 6, 3, 1) + 0.2, mgp = c(3.8, 1.5, 0))
          # cols <- hcl.colors(4, hcl_color_palette)
          cols <- psi_col_map[as.character(sapply(fils, function(f) f$psi))]
          # cols <- c(cols[1], cols[2], cols[3])
          plot_skewness_multi(
            df = df_to_use,
            filters = fils,
            generations = gen,
            labels = list(
              title = paste0(type, " distribution across generations"),
              x = "generation",
              y = "skewness of phenotype distribution"
            ),
            show_rep = TRUE,
            cols = cols,
          )
          leg_expr <- as.expression(lapply(lapply(fils, function(f) f$psi), function(v) bquote(psi == .(v))))
                
          legend("topright", bty = "n",
                  legend = leg_expr,
                col = cols, lwd = 2, cex=2.2)
          dev.off()
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

```
```{r}
sort_cols <- c("n", "psi", "rep", "gap", "shift_size", "reg", "generation")

geno_df  <- geno_df[do.call(order, geno_df[sort_cols]), ]
pheno_df <- pheno_df[do.call(order, pheno_df[sort_cols]), ]

# check that metadata rows now match
stopifnot(identical(geno_df[sort_cols], pheno_df[sort_cols]))
```

```{r}
ind_cols <- grep("^[0-9]+$", names(geno_df), value = TRUE)

diff_df <- geno_df
diff_df[ind_cols] <- pheno_df[ind_cols] - geno_df[ind_cols]

```

## plot multi generation 
```{r}
breaks_vec <- seq(-40, 150, by = 1)                 # outside [-5,5] ignored
filt <- list(reg="inv", n=8, shift_size=120, beta=0.0)
gens <- c(9999, 10010, 10020, 10030, 10050, 10070, 10100)

col = grDevices::hcl.colors(3, "Dark 2", rev = TRUE)[3]

out_dir  <- file.path(base_plot_folder, "geno_multi")
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)
out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0( reg, "_geno.png"))

png(out_file, width=2200, height=1500, res=150)
par(cex.axis = 1.6, cex.lab = 2.0, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(4.5, 6, 3, 1) + 0.1)
plot_multigen_binned_single_filter(
  df = geno_df,
  filter = filt,
  generations = gens,
  breaks = breaks_vec,
  title = bquote("Binned distributions (" * psi==.(filt$beta) * ")"),
  xlab  = "Genotype value",
  ylab  = "Proportion",
  col   = col,
  show_rep = FALSE,
  legend_pos = "topright",
  legend_as_offset = TRUE,
  ymax = 0.2
)
leg_expr <- as.expression( bquote(psi == .(filt$beta)))
                
# legend("topright", bty = "n",
#         legend = leg_expr,
#        col = grDevices::hcl.colors(2, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE), lwd = 2, cex=2.2)
dev.off()
cat("Saved:", out_file, "\n")
```

## heatmap of distributions over time plot
```{r}
  for (n in c(2,8, 20,50)){
    for (shift_size in c(20, 40, 60)){
      for (reg in c("ave", "ext", "fit")){
        for (p in c(0, 0.5, 0.9)){
        for (type in c("genotype", "phenotype")){
          plot_folder = paste0(base_plot_folder, paste0(type, "_heatmap_gap_", gap), "/")
          if (!dir.exists(plot_folder)) {
            dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
          }
          cat("Plotting:", type, " n:", n, " shift_size:", shift_size, " reg:", reg, "\n")
          breaks_vec <- seq(-1*(as.integer(shift_size))-10, as.integer(shift_size+10), by = 1)  
          if (type == "genotype"){
            df_to_use <- geno_df
          } else if (type == "phenotype"){
            df_to_use <- pheno_df
          }

          filt_A <- list(reg = reg, psi = p, n = n, shift_size = shift_size, fluctuate_gap = gap)
          # filt_B <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.5, n = n, shift_size = shift_size, fluctuate_gap = 10)
          # filt_C <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.9, n = n, shift_size = shift_size, fluctuate_gap = 10)
          png(paste0(plot_folder, "reg_", reg, "_n_", n, "_psi_", p, "_sz_", shift_size,"_gap_", gap, ".png"), width = 2500, height = 1800, res = 150)
          
          title <- paste0(
          if (reg == "inv") "Homogenous group" else
              if (reg == "fit") "copy the best" else
              if (reg == "ext") "copy the extreme" else
                  if (reg == "ave") "copy the average",
          " model (n = ", n, ", psi = ", p, ", sz=", shift_size, ")"
          )
          
          par(cex.axis = 2.5, cex.lab = 2.5, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(6, 6, 3, 12) + 0.2, mgp = c(3.8, 1.5, 0))

          plot_genotype_heatmap(
            df     = df_to_use,
            filter = c(filt_A),
            labels = list(
              title = title,
              x = "Generation",
              y = "Genotype distribution"
            ),
            z = "prop",
            breaks_vec = breaks_vec,
            draw_colorbar = TRUE
          )
          dev.off()
        }
      }
    }
  }
  }

```


## pdf of the heatmaps 
```{r}

# ----------------- user-editable settings -----------------
ns    <- c(2, 8, 20, 50)
psis  <- c(0, 0.5, 0.9)
regs  <- c("ave", "fit", "ext")
types <- c("genotype", "phenotype")
szs   <- c(20, 40, 60)

xcol <- "generation"          # change to "tick" if needed
gap_col <- "fluctuate_gap"    # column name in your dfs

# If phenotype is NOT wide numeric columns, set this to its value column name, e.g. "z"
# If phenotype IS wide numeric columns too, leave NULL.
pheno_value_col <- NULL

plot_folder <- paste0(base_plot_folder, "heatmap_pdf/")
if (!dir.exists(plot_folder)) dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
# ============================ main PDF loop ================================
for (shift_size in szs) {

  pdf_file <- file.path(
    plot_folder,
    paste0("heatmap_grid_gap_", gap, "_sz_", shift_size, ".pdf")
  )

  pdf(pdf_file, width = 18, height = 10, onefile = TRUE)

  # breaks fixed within this shift_size
  breaks_vec <- seq(-1 * as.integer(shift_size) - 10, as.integer(shift_size) + 10, by = 1)

  for (type in types) {
    if (type == "genotype") df_to_use <- geno_df
    else if (type == "phenotype") df_to_use <- pheno_df
    else if (type == "fitness") df_to_use <- fitness_df

    # decide how to read values for this type
    mode <- if (!is.null(pheno_value_col)) "long_col" else "wide_numeric"
    vcol <- if (mode == "long_col") pheno_value_col else NULL

    for (reg in regs) {

      # ---- 1) build ALL heatmats for this page, and compute shared zlim ----
      hm_list <- vector("list", length(psis) * length(ns))
      names(hm_list) <- paste(rep(psis, each = length(ns)), rep(ns, times = length(psis)), sep = "_")

      max_vals <- c()
      idx <- 1
      for (p in psis) {
        for (n in ns) {
          filt <- list(
            reg = reg,
            psi = p,
            n = n,
            shift_size = shift_size
          )
          # include gap filter only if column exists
          if (gap_col %in% names(df_to_use)) filt[[gap_col]] <- gap

          hm <- .build_heatmat(
            df = df_to_use,
            filter = filt,
            xcol = xcol,
            breaks_vec = breaks_vec,
            mode = mode,
            value_col = vcol,
            z = "prop"
          )

          hm_list[[idx]] <- hm
          if (!is.null(hm)) max_vals <- c(max_vals, max(hm$mat, na.rm = TRUE))
          idx <- idx + 1
        }
      }

      zlim_page <- c(0, max(max_vals, na.rm = TRUE))
      if (!is.finite(zlim_page[2]) || zlim_page[2] <= 0) zlim_page <- c(0, 1e-6)

      # ---- 2) layout: 3 rows × (4 panels + 1 colorbar) ----
      lay <- matrix(1:12, nrow = 3, ncol = 4, byrow = TRUE)
      lay <- cbind(lay, 13)
      layout(lay, widths = c(rep(1, 4), 0.40))


      # page title space
      par(oma = c(0.5, 0.5, 2.0, 0.5))

      # panel styling (you can control par() outside normally, but for PDF pages this is convenient)
      par(
        mar = c(2.8, 3.0, 2.0, 0.5),
        mgp = c(1.8, 0.6, 0),
        cex.axis = 0.9,
        cex.lab  = 1.0,
        cex.main = 0.95
      )

      # ---- 3) draw panels row-major: psi rows, n columns ----
      idx <- 1
      for (p in psis) {
        for (n in ns) {
          hm <- hm_list[[idx]]

          panel_title <- paste0("n=", n, ", psi=", p)
          xlab <- if (p == psis[length(psis)]) "Generation" else ""
          ylab <- if (n == ns[1]) {
            if (type == "genotype") "Genotype" else "Phenotype"
          } else ""

          .plot_heat_panel(
            hm = hm,
            zlim = zlim_page,
            col = hcl.colors(100, hcl_color_palette),
            main = panel_title,
            xlab = xlab,
            ylab = ylab,
            axes = TRUE,
            box = TRUE
          )

          idx <- idx + 1
        }
      }

      # ---- 4) shared colorbar cell ----
      par(mar = c(2.8, 0.3, 2.0, 3.5), mgp = c(1.8, 0.6, 0))
      .draw_colorbar_panel(zlim_page, col = hcl.colors(100, hcl_color_palette), label = "Proportion")

      # ---- 5) page title ----
      mtext(
        paste0(
          "shift_size=", shift_size, ", gap=", gap,
          " | ", .reg_label(reg), " | ", type
        ),
        side = 3, outer = TRUE, line = 0.2, cex = 1.2
      )
    }
  }

  dev.off()
  cat("Wrote:", pdf_file, "\n")
}

```
